name: CUI
api571_alignment: Simplified API 571-aligned external corrosion under insulation screening logic.
validation_notes: Strongest when insulation, susceptible steel, and CUI temperature range align.

name: Chloride SCC
api571_alignment: Simplified API 571-aligned chloride stress corrosion cracking screening logic.
validation_notes: Strongest when austenitic stainless steel, chlorides, water, and elevated temperature align.

name: Wet H2S damage / SSC risk
api571_alignment: Simplified API 571-aligned wet H2S / sulfide stress cracking screening logic.
validation_notes: Strongest when wet sour service, susceptible steel, and stress or PWHT concerns align.

name: CO2 corrosion
api571_alignment: Simplified API 571-aligned sweet corrosion screening logic.
validation_notes: Strongest when carbon steel, water, and CO2 align in liquid or multiphase service.

name: Amine corrosion
api571_alignment: Simplified API 571-aligned amine corrosion screening logic.
validation_notes: Strongest when aqueous amine service and carbon steel equipment align.

name: Sulfidation
validation_notes: Strongest when sulfur-bearing service, susceptible steel, and high temperature align.

name: Caustic cracking
api571_alignment: Simplified API 571-aligned caustic cracking screening logic.
validation_notes: Strongest when caustic environment, carbon steel, and stress or cyclic conditions align.

name: Erosion-corrosion
validation_notes: Strongest when liquid or multiphase flow and turbulent geometry or erosive clues align.
